name: Mighty Networks → Kit Onboarding Drip Sequence

parameters.content:
# 📬 Mighty Networks → Kit Onboarding Drip Sequence

**Who it's for:** Community builders, course creators, and membership operators using Mighty Networks + Kit (ConvertKit).

**What it does:** When a new member joins your Mighty Networks community, this workflow automatically subscribes them to a Kit email drip sequence no manual entry required.

## How it works
1. Receives the Mighty Networks webhook when a new member joins
2. Parses member data (email, name) handles 5 different webhook payload formats
3. Subscribes them to your Kit onboarding email sequence via the API
4. Logs the subscription result for debugging

## Setup
1. Copy the webhook URL from the Webhook node → paste it in Mighty Networks admin → Webhooks
2. Connect your Kit API credentials in n8n
3. Update the sequence ID in the ConvertKit node to match your Kit sequence
4. Test by adding a member to your community

---
**Created by [Ahmad Bukhari](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bukhariahmad)** | [ahmadbukhari.com](https://ahmadbukhari.com)
